message:
refactor: prune 13 unused workspace sub-crate deps and simplify MCP entry point

Cargo.toml (workspace root):
- Remove 7 fastmcp-* and 6 fastapi-* sub-crate dependency declarations
  that were never directly referenced — only top-level re-export crates needed

crates/frankenterm/Cargo.toml:
- Remove direct fastmcp dep from CLI binary (now encapsulated in core)

crates/frankenterm/src/mcp.rs:
- Use frankenterm_core::mcp::run_stdio_server() instead of direct
  fastmcp::StdioTransport usage

crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs:
- Migrate tokio::spawn → runtime_compat::task::spawn in saved-search
  scheduler tests for runtime-agnostic task spawning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,15 +37,14 @@ dirs = "6.0.0"
 sha2.workspace = true
 zip.workspace = true
 zstd.workspace = true
-fastmcp = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 asupersync = { workspace = true, features = ["tls"] }
 
 [features]
 default = []
 frankenterm = ["frankenterm-core/frankenterm"]
 vendored = ["frankenterm"]  # backward compat alias
 browser = ["frankenterm-core/browser"]
-mcp = ["frankenterm-core/mcp", "dep:fastmcp"]
+mcp = ["frankenterm-core/mcp"]
 web = ["frankenterm-core/web"]
 tui = ["frankenterm-core/tui"]
 ftui = ["frankenterm-core/ftui"]
